phase1.output:
=== Publishing to Itch.io ===
🎮 Game: My Game
📁 URL: https://your-username.itch.io/my-game

--- Steps to Publish ---
1. Create an Itch.io account
2. Click 'Upload New Project'
3. Fill in game details
4. Upload your build files
5. Set price (free or paid)
6. Publish!

--- What to Include ---
✅ Game executable (.exe, .app, .x86_64)
✅ Game data folder
✅ Screenshots
✅ Game icon
✅ Description

--- Tips ---
• Use a game jam as a deadline
• Add a playable WebGL version
• Respond to comments
• Update your game based on feedback
phase1.explanation:
🎮 **Itch.io is the best platform for indie game publishing.**

**What Itch.io offers:**
- Free and paid games
- Community features
- No publishing fee
- Direct downloads and WebGL play

**Sharp-chan says:**
"Itch.io is the perfect place to share your first game."
phase1.openingDialogue: Publish to Itch.io: share your game. 🌐

phase2.errorMessage: (No error — but players get a broken game.)

phase3.prompt:
Which platform is best for publishing your first indie game?

A) Steam  
B) Itch.io  
C) Epic Games Store  
D) Google Play

Select the CORRECT answer.
dialogueHints: Think about which platform is easiest for beginners.
It has a supportive indie community.
